facebook.content:
"Marriage is not just a union between two people, but a picture of the relationship between Christ and His church. It's a dynamic of surrendered love and unrelenting sacrifice. Just as Christ laid down His life for us, so too are we called to lay down our lives for our spouse. 

'Wives, submit yourselves to your own husbands as you do to the Lord. Husbands, love your wives, just as Christ loved the church and gave Himself up for her.' Ephesians 5:22-25
facebook.fullPost:
"Marriage is not just a union between two people, but a picture of the relationship between Christ and His church. It's a dynamic of surrendered love and unrelenting sacrifice. Just as Christ laid down His life for us, so too are we called to lay down our lives for our spouse. 

'Wives, submit yourselves to your own husbands as you do to the Lord. Husbands, love your wives, just as Christ loved the church and gave Himself up for her.' Ephesians 5:22-25



Watch the full teaching

#KingdomTeaching #IFM #IncreasingFaith

instagram.content:
You are not defined by your marriage, but by your relationship with Jesus. He is the foundation, the cornerstone that holds your entire life together. 

"Upon this rock, I will build my church..." Matthew 16:18. Your marriage is built upon Him, not the other way around.

 Double tap if your marriage is rooted in Jesus. What is one area in your life where you must re-center it around Him?

tiktok.content: Authority is not about being in control, but about operating under the control of the Holy Spirit. You are not the ruler of your life, nor your relationships, but a steward of what God has entrusted to you.  - 1 Corinthians 4:1-2
